name: Pylon
api_surface: Broad REST API (issues, accounts, contacts, KB, messages, teams, webhooks).

name: fanbasis
api_surface: REST API (checkout sessions, subscriptions, customers, webhooks) + official Node/Python/PHP/Ruby SDKs.

name: Otter AI
auth: OAuth2 (Claude/ChatGPT connector) + bearer token (Enterprise API, beta)
api_surface: Official MCP server (search/list/fetch transcripts); public REST API is beta, Enterprise-only.

name: Reducto
api_surface: REST API (parse/split/extract/edit) + Python/Node/Go SDKs + CLI + MCP server.
